build.buildCommand: echo '=== Starting build ===' && pwd && ls -la && rm -rf dist node_modules/.vite && echo '=== Installing dependencies ===' && npm install --prefer-offline --no-audit && echo '=== Building ===' && npm run build && echo '=== Build completed ===' && echo '=== Checking dist ===' && ls -la dist/ && echo '=== Checking assets ===' && ls -la dist/assets/ && echo '=== Verifying index.html matches assets ===' && JS_FILE=$(ls dist/assets/*.js | xargs -n1 basename) && CSS_FILE=$(ls dist/assets/*.css | xargs -n1 basename) && echo 'JS file: '$JS_FILE && echo 'CSS file: '$CSS_FILE && if grep -q "$JS_FILE" dist/index.html && grep -q "$CSS_FILE" dist/index.html; then echo '✅ index.html matches assets'; else echo '❌ index.html does NOT match assets! Regenerating...' && sed -i "s|src=\"/assets/[^\"]*\"|src=\"/assets/$JS_FILE\"|g" dist/index.html && sed -i "s|href=\"/assets/[^\"]*\"|href=\"/assets/$CSS_FILE\"|g" dist/index.html && echo '✅ index.html updated'; fi
